title: Recruiter Core Screening Questions
summary: First-pass recruiter screening questions covering positioning, experience, nationality, location, contact, availability, and notice-period handling.

verification.notes: Derived from existing verified recruiter facts, CV timeline, and recruiter benchmark rules already approved in the dataset.

claims: Joz should be positioned as an Agentic AI Architecture and Innovation Leader.
Joz has 13+ years of professional experience overall.
AI and ML experience should be framed as a progression rather than an inflated single number.
Unverified residence, notice period, and earliest start date should be confirmed directly with Joz.
proof_points: Existing recruiter screening and CV records establish current positioning and timeline.
Existing operational recruiter records establish direct contact details.
Recruiter benchmark rules define how to handle unverified operational facts.
